name: Singles Match
description: One-on-one contest with standard rules.

name: Triple Threat
description: Three wrestlers compete at the same time; first fall wins.

name: Fatal 4-Way
description: Four-way match where the first wrestler to score a fall wins.

name: Hardcore Match
description: No disqualifications; weapons and extreme spots are legal.

name: Steel Cage
description: Match takes place inside a steel cage with escape or pinfall win conditions.

name: Elimination Chamber
description: Six competitors enter pods and are eliminated one by one until one remains.

name: Royal Rumble
description: Entrants arrive at intervals; elimination happens by throwing opponents over the top rope.

name: Ladder Match
description: Victory is earned by climbing a ladder and retrieving the prize above the ring.

name: Last Man Standing
description: A wrestler wins when the opponent cannot answer the referee's ten count.

name: Submission Match
description: Pinfalls are not counted; the only way to win is by submission.

name: Iron Man Match
description: Timed match where the wrestler with the most falls at the end wins.

name: Hell in a Cell
description: Brutal cage match enclosed by a roofed cell structure.

name: No Disqualification
description: There are no disqualifications, allowing use of weapons and outside interference.

name: TLC Match
description: Tables, ladders, and chairs are legal and commonly used.

name: Gauntlet Match
description: Wrestlers enter sequentially; each winner stays in until all challengers are faced.

name: First Blood Match
description: The winner is the first wrestler to make the opponent bleed.

name: Falls Count Anywhere
description: Pinfalls and submissions count anywhere in the arena.

name: Extreme Rules
description: No disqualification match with high emphasis on weapons and stipulations.

name: Tables Match
description: A wrestler wins by putting the opponent through a table.

name: Handicap Match
description: Uneven sides battle, such as one wrestler against a team.

name: Tornado Tag Team
description: Both members of each team are legal in the ring at the same time.

name: Battle Royal
description: Multiple entrants fight simultaneously with elimination over the top rope.

name: Casket Match
description: Win by placing the opponent inside a casket and closing the lid.

name: Inferno Match
description: Ring is surrounded by fire; objective is to set the opponent on fire in classic rulesets.

name: No Holds Barred
description: Very few restrictions with brutal offense and minimal referee intervention.

name: Ambulance Match
description: Victory condition is forcing the opponent into an ambulance and shutting the doors.

name: Strap Match
description: Opponents are tied together with a strap; often requires touching all four corners to win.
